The studio has added new islands, new Pals, raids, crossovers, base-building improvements, PvP features, balance changes, and quality-of-life updates.
The update will move Palworld out of Early Access and into its full Version 1.0 release.
Existing save data should carry over to Palworld 1.0, but starting fresh may be a better way to experience the full release.

After a couple of years swimming in the waters of early access, definitely-not-Pokémon survival crafter *Palworld* is hitting the big stage with its 1.0 launch on July 10th. Without much to fear from Nintendo’s legal challenge at this point, *Palworld* is free to spread its crazy wings and fly into a full-fledged release. The release will come with a huge number of changes and additions, as a *Palworld* rep confirmed that there are 27 pages of patch notes to relay. Studio Pocketpair teased some of the changes, including an overhaul of the tower boss to be “much more dynamic and engaging” as well as a revamp of wildlife sanctuaries. ### TennoCon 2026: Everything you need to know about Warframe’s reveals from TennoLive. ### Warframe of Mind: Reacting to the big reveals of TennoCon 2026. ### Perfect Ten: The 10 types of MMO guides you find in the wild.","score":0.93468803,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://shockbyte.com/blog/when-is-the-palworld-1-0-release-date","title":"When Is The Palworld 1.0 Release Date | Shockbyte","content":"# When Is The Palworld 1.0 Release Date? What 1.0 *did* add for dedicated servers: **in-game voice chat** (enable it in the server’s world settings; not available on WinGDK), **improved guild roles with per-role permissions**, adjusted default world settings for the new PvP mode, and **optimized dedicated-server performance** that holds up better with many players online. If you thought Palworld was just going to quietly fade out after the viral chaos of 2024, you were wrong. Pocketpair dropped a bomb at Summer Game Fest 2026: Palworld version 1.0 launches on July 10, and they’re calling it the biggest update the game has ever had. And somehow, two and a half years later, a small Japanese studio that got sued by Nintendo is still here, still building. Here is everything happening with Palworld 1.0 and why it actually matters. Palworld launched on January 19, 2024, for Xbox and PC.
